v2_sources.title: Efficacy and safety of weekly paclitaxel with or without ramucirumab as second-line therapy for the treatment of advanced gastric or gastroesophageal junction adenocarcinoma (RAINBOW-Asia): a randomised, multicentre, double-blind, phase 3 trial
v2_sources.citation: Efficacy and safety of weekly paclitaxel with or without ramucirumab as second-line therapy for the treatment of advanced gastric or gastroesophageal junction adenocarcinoma (RAINBOW-Asia): a randomised, multicentre, double-blind, phase 3 trial. The Lancet Gastroenterology & Hepatology. 2021.

boundary_tags.population_or_model: 晚期胃或胃食管结合部腺癌（胃腺癌或胃食管结合部腺癌）患者，一线化疗后疾病进展

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Median progression-free survival was 4.14 months (95% CI 3.71–4.30) in the ramucirumab plus paclitaxel group compared with 3.15 months (2.83–4.14) in the placebo plus paclitaxel group (HR
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Median progression-free survival was 4.14 months (95% CI 3.71–4.30) in the ramucirumab plus paclitaxel group compared with 3.15 months (2.83–4.14) in the placebo plus paclitaxel group (HR

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Median overall survival was 8.71 months (95% CI 7.98–9.49) in the ramucirumab plus paclitaxel group and 7.92 months (6.31–9.10) in the placebo plus paclitaxel group (HR 0.963, 95% CI 0.77
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Median overall survival was 8.71 months (95% CI 7.98–9.49) in the ramucirumab plus paclitaxel group and 7.92 months (6.31–9.10) in the placebo plus paclitaxel group (HR 0.963, 95% CI 0.77

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Objective response rate: 26.5% (95% CI 21.6–32.0) in ramucirumab plus paclitaxel group vs 21.9% (95% CI 15.5–29.5) in placebo plus paclitaxel group', 'page': 6}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Objective response rate: 26.5% (95% CI 21.6–32.0) in ramucirumab plus paclitaxel group vs 21.9% (95% CI 15.5–29.5) in placebo plus paclitaxel group', 'page': 6}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Disease control rate: 76.9% (95% CI 71.6–81.6) in ramucirumab plus paclitaxel group vs 72.6% (95% CI 64.6–79.7) in placebo plus paclitaxel group', 'page': 6}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Disease control rate: 76.9% (95% CI 71.6–81.6) in ramucirumab plus paclitaxel group vs 72.6% (95% CI 64.6–79.7) in placebo plus paclitaxel group', 'page': 6}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Median duration of response was longer in ramucirumab plus paclitaxel group (4.34 months, 95% CI 3.12–5.22) than placebo plus paclitaxel group (2.83 months, 95% CI 2.56–4.14)', 'page': 6}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Median duration of response was longer in ramucirumab plus paclitaxel group (4.34 months, 95% CI 3.12–5.22) than placebo plus paclitaxel group (2.83 months, 95% CI 2.56–4.14)', 'page': 6}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Grade 3 or worse treatment-emergent adverse events were observed in 224 (76%) patients in ramucirumab plus paclitaxel group vs 95 (66%) in placebo plus paclitaxel group', 'page': 7}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Grade 3 or worse treatment-emergent adverse events were observed in 224 (76%) patients in ramucirumab plus paclitaxel group vs 95 (66%) in placebo plus paclitaxel group', 'page': 7}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Most common grade 3 or worse adverse events: decreased neutrophil count (54% vs 39%), decreased white blood cell count (43% vs 29%), anaemia (16% vs 17%)', 'page': 1}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Most common grade 3 or worse adverse events: decreased neutrophil count (54% vs 39%), decreased white blood cell count (43% vs 29%), anaemia (16% vs 17%)', 'page': 1}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Febrile neutropenia occurred in 18 (6%) patients in ramucirumab plus paclitaxel group vs 1 (<1%) patient in placebo plus paclitaxel group', 'page': 8}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Febrile neutropenia occurred in 18 (6%) patients in ramucirumab plus paclitaxel group vs 1 (<1%) patient in placebo plus paclitaxel group', 'page': 8}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'The study met its predefined success criterion (stratified HR for OS <1 and nominal p<0.05 for PFS) as required by Chinese regulatory authority', 'page': 8}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'The study met its predefined success criterion (stratified HR for OS <1 and nominal p<0.05 for PFS) as required by Chinese regulatory authority', 'page': 8}
